'''[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Mantrony''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Bakuran]] naval officer who served under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Hortel Ossilege]]. She commanded the [[Namana-class light cruiser|''Namana''-class light cruiser]] ''[[Watchkeeper]]''. During the [[Corellian Crisis|First Corellian Insurrection]], the ''Watchkeeper'' was one of four ships that penetrated the [[Interdiction field/Legends|interdiction field]] encompassing the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] using an experimental device called the [[hyperwave inertial momentum sustainer]]. Unfortunately, Captain Mantrony's vessel was damaged in the process and lost its propulsion systems.

Over Captain Mantony's objections, Admiral Ossilege proposed to use the drifting ''Watchkeeper'' as a decoy to draw out the secret weapon of the [[Sacorrian Triad]] on [[Selonia/Legends|Selonia]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Assault at Selonia]]'' {{1st}}
